one_line: Indo-Aryan king of Paurava who faced Alexander at the Hydaspes.

appearance.age_look: Early 40s, tall and broad-shouldered, powerful athletic build.
appearance.face: Strong oval face with high cheekbones, medium-brown North Indian complexion, straight prominent nose, thick arched brows, neatly trimmed moustache and short boxed beard; default expression calm and proud with intense, unflinching eyes.
appearance.hair: Long straight black hair reaching mid-back, center-parted and pulled into a low knot at the nape; front sections left loose to frame the face; topped with a simple conical bronze helmet with a short nasal guard and a dark crimson cloth turban-wrap around its base forming a soft band.
appearance.costume: Sleeveless quilted cotton war-vest (zarded) in muted indigo with vertical stitching and a knee-length hem, worn over a light off‑white cotton tunic; a broad dark crimson woolen sash tightly wrapped around his waist with the knot resting over the left hip; fitted off‑white cotton trousers tapering to the ankle and tucked into mid‑calf brown leather boots with laced fronts; over the vest a bronze scale cuirass covering chest and upper abdomen, with small overlapping rectangular scales, and simple bronze bracers on both forearms; around his shoulders a mustard‑ochre woolen rajpatka-style cloak pinned on the right side with a round bronze brooch, the cloak’s edge decorated with a narrow, alternating red-and-black geometric border; minimal jewellery—one plain gold torque at the neck and a single small gold hoop earring in the left ear.
appearance.signature: A long north-Indian style straight sword (early talwar-like) with a slightly flared tip, iron blade showing subtle pattern lines, a simple bronze hilt with a short crossbar and disc pommel, carried in a dark brown leather scabbard worn on a baldric crossing his chest from right shoulder to left hip.

ref_desc: King Porus is a tall broad-shouldered warrior-king with medium-brown skin, long black hair in a low knot under a bronze conical helmet with crimson wrap, wearing an indigo quilted vest, bronze scale cuirass, off-white tunic and trousers, mustard-ochre cloak, crimson sash, and carrying a straight bronze-hilted sword in a brown scabbard.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of King Porus as a tall, broad-shouldered Indo-Aryan warrior-king in his early 40s with a strong oval face, medium-brown complexion, intense eyes, thick brows, and a neatly trimmed moustache with short boxed beard; his long straight black hair is center-parted, reaching mid-back, tied in a low knot at the nape, with some front strands framing his face, and he wears a simple bronze conical helmet with a short nasal guard and a dark crimson cloth wrapped around its base as a band. Show him in a sleeveless quilted cotton war-vest in muted indigo with vertical stitching and a knee-length hem over a light off-white cotton tunic, a broad dark crimson woolen sash tightly wrapped at the waist tied over his left hip, fitted off-white cotton trousers tucked into mid-calf brown leather boots with laced fronts, and over the vest a bronze scale cuirass of small overlapping rectangular scales plus plain bronze bracers on his forearms. Drape a mustard-ochre woolen cloak over his shoulders, pinned on the right side with a round bronze brooch, its edges trimmed with a narrow red-and-black geometric border; give him a plain gold torque at his neck and a single small gold hoop earring in his left ear. His signature weapon is a long straight north-Indian style sword with a subtly patterned iron blade, simple bronze crossguard and disc pommel, in a dark brown leather scabbard worn on a baldric from right shoulder to left hip. Use a grounded palette of indigo blue, dark crimson, mustard ochre, off-white, bronze, and brown, and show front, side, and back views clearly emphasizing consistent hair, armor, clothing details, and sword placement.
